headline: AXON's Dedrone Expands in CUAS Capability: Can It Deliver Growth?
summary: AXON's Dedrone platform expands counter-drone capabilities with AI, sensor technology and strong revenue growth momentum.

headline: Teledyne MEMS Selected to Support Two FABrIC Challenge Award Recipients
summary: EDMONTON, Alberta, June 25, 2026--Teledyne MEMS announced today that it has been selected as the advanced micro-electro-mechanical systems (MEMS) manufacturing partner for two recipients of the latest FABrIC Challenge funding awards announced by CMC Microsystems through the Government of Canada’s FABrIC initiative.
